user.title: Helen Energy Consumption
user.description: Sign in with your Oma Helen credentials. Only electricity consumption is imported.

select_site.title: Select delivery site
select_site.description: Your account has more than one delivery site. Choose which one to import; each option shows its meter number (GSRN) and address.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Helen
reauth_confirm.description: Your Helen session expired. Enter your password again.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Helen. Try again later.
error.invalid_delivery_site_id: That delivery site could not be selected.

abort.no_delivery_sites: This Helen account has no electricity delivery site to import.
